Features

Sab kuch jo aapko chahiye

Enterprise-grade TTS technology, India-friendly pricing. No compromise.

20+ Indian Languages

Hindi, English, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi and more.

Neural AI Voices

Microsoft Neural voices — the same technology used by Fortune 500 companies. Crystal clear quality.

Generate in Seconds

No waiting. Type your text, choose a voice, download your audio. Done in under 3 seconds.

MP3 Download

Download your audio files in high-quality MP3 format. Use them anywhere — YouTube, podcasts, ads.

Credit System

Simple, transparent pricing. 1 credit = 2 characters. No hidden fees. Buy only what you need.

Secure & Private

Your data is encrypted. We never store your generated audio. 100% private.

Premium Voices

100+ voices across all major Indian and world languages

India-First Pricing

Seedha rupees mein. Koi dollar conversion nahi.
